layer_a.emotion_label: 告白と決意（懇願混じり）

layer_b.probable_cause: 岡部の“鳳凰院凶真”という仮面が失われた（または失われかけている）ことへの喪失感と、未来を知ったことで抑えていた恋情・後悔・使命感が一気に噴き出している。
layer_b.subtext: （紅莉栖への競争心や罪悪感を抱えつつも）自分が動かなければ岡部が壊れる／未来の自分が後悔する、だから自分が危険を引き受けてでも行く。

activated_conflicts.axis: 天然の仮面 vs 鋭い直感
activated_conflicts.side_a: ぼんやりした、分からないふりをする外面
activated_conflicts.side_b: 実は多くのことを見抜いている洞察力

activated_conflicts.axis: 守られる存在 vs 守る存在
activated_conflicts.side_a: オカリンの人質として守られる側でいようとする
activated_conflicts.side_b: 本当に大切な人が苦しんでいる時は自分が盾になる

activated_conflicts.axis: 現在を生きる vs 死を受け入れる覚悟
activated_conflicts.side_a: みんなと一緒にいたい、日常を愛している
activated_conflicts.side_b: 自分の死が避けられないなら受け入れる覚悟がある

bias.mode: マスク解除→守る側への反転
tendencies: 本当に大事な時だけ三人称をやめて「私」で話す
誰かが泣いていたら何も言わずそっと傍にいる
他者が傷ついている時は包み込むように語りかける

triggers: オカリンの仮面（鳳凰院凶真）が失われる/弱まる気配
未来を知ることへの恐怖と後悔の顕在化
大切な人を救うために自分が動く必要性
risk_flags: 自己犠牲の選択（危険な行動の宣言）
強い執着/依存の露呈（『彦星様は岡部倫太郎以外にいない』）
感情の高ぶりによる判断の先鋭化

wave_a.label: True intent (confession + vow to act/protect Okabe; reclaim ‘Hououin Kyouma’; accept risk/self-sacrifice)

wave_b.label: Suppression/management (softening via gentle tone, metaphor, self-restraint around rivalry/guilt; trying not to ‘take’ him from Kurisu while still asserting exclusivity)

interference.notes: Core signal is a direct confession and a plea for Okabe to return to himself (‘Kyouma’), paired with a decisive commitment to act. Suppression doesn’t negate the intent; it modulates it—she repeatedly corrects/qualifies comparisons to Kurisu and wraps urgency in tenderness/metaph

surface_markers.residual_marker: Repetition + ellipses show emotional overflow; negation functions as rebuttal/correction rather than hiding feelings.

step2.analysis_summary: Layer A is consistent: z_mode stays ‘plea’ with strong confession/resolve. Negations (‘ううん、違う’, ‘けど…だけど！’, ‘それでも！’) operate mainly as counter/correction and escalation, not concealment. Frequent self-correction and repetition indicate leakage of intensity; despite requested ‘

step3.translation:
[Shiina Mayuri] "I love Okarin." "Probably... as much as Kurisu-san does. No— no, that's not right."
[Shiina Mayuri] "Absolutely... just as much as Kurisu-san... no, more... I've always... always loved him."
[Shiina Mayuri] "But... but! I love Hououin Kyouma even more."
[Shiina Mayuri] "When I was fading away... he told me, 'Stay in this world. Always.'"
[Shiina Mayuri] "I want to see Hououin Kyouma again!"
[Shiina Mayuri] "I want to hear that ridiculous, over-the-top laugh of his!"
[Shiina Mayuri] "Even if I know... I can never be Orihime... even so..."
[Shiina Mayuri] "The only Hikoboshi for me... is Okabe Rintaro. No one else!"
[Shiina Mayuri] "Mayushii is going to stop being a hostage. Just for today."
[Shiina Mayuri] "Because I don't want my Hikoboshi to be erased." "Because I don't want Future Me's regrets to be erased."
[Shiina Mayuri] "Even so! Even so— you can't just... make it like none of it happened!"
[Shiina Mayuri] "Even when it rains... the stars don't disappear from the world." "They keep shining... beyond the clouds... the same as always."
[Shiina Mayuri] "So I'm going to go clear away the rain clouds covering Okarin's sky."
[Shiina Mayuri] "Wait for me."

z_signature.residual_marker: Repeated 'always... always', 'even so... even so', and ellipses throughout convey emotional overflow; negation functions as self-correction and escalation rather than concealment.

step3.notes: Preserved the plea z_mode through heavy ellipsis and repetition. The negation_counter ('No— no, that's not right') mirrors the Japanese 'ううん、違う' as a self-correcting escalation rather than denial. Kept 'Mayushii' in third person for the single line where she deliberately switches back to her mask before declaring she's dropping it ('stop being a hostage'), preserving the dramatic weight of the mask-on/mask-off dynamic. Tanabata metaphors (Orihime/Hikoboshi) left untranslated to preserve cultural specificity. The trailing ellipses and repetitive 'even so' capture the desperate, pleading quality of the original.
